summary: PASS — Full onboarding → LAUNCH → nexushome flow verified end-to-end on mobile viewport 414x896. All 10 onboarding screens traversed successfully (Welcome → App Tour → Safety Consent → Safety Pledge → Legal Docs → Permissions → Q&A → Server Privacy → PC Setup → Launch). Screen 10 'ALL DONE!' + 'LAUNCH BUTLER AI' confirmed. Tapping LAUNCH (via testID `onboarding-launch-primary`) navigated from pathname `/` → `/nexushome` within ~2.5s. localStorage flag `@butler_onboarding_done_v2` was set to 'true', `@butler_boot_complete_at` was stamped (proving (tabs)/_layout mounted), and the home dashboard rendered with all 8 tab labels (HOME, SCRIPTS, AI, KB, PC, BUILD, SKINS, CONFIG) visible. No `_NexusBoundary` RECOVERY MODE was triggered. ZERO console errors during the LAUNCH transition.

critical_test_evidence.post_launch_body_excerpt_first_700: BUTLER-CORE · VISION SYS v2.1 / SCAN: ACTIVE · SENTRY: ARMED · UPLINK: LAN-ONLY / BLR-01·STBY ... GOOD EVENING · BUTLER AI ONLINE / LAN-ONLY · ZERO TELEMETRY · YOUR PC · YOUR RULES / SECURED · LAN-ONLY / 0 cloud · 7 LAN · 0 trackers · 0 ads / AUDIT / COMMAND DECK · LIVE / LOCAL TIME / SESSION / OPS TODAY ... + tab bar HOME/SCRIPTS/AI/KB/PC/BUILD/SKINS/CONFIG
console_warnings_during_launch: [kbGrowthTracker] documentDirectory unavailable  // benign — expo-file-system/legacy has no documentDirectory on web; PC-data card just stays empty

screen_transitions.S3_safety_consent_I_ACCEPT: OK (4 required checkboxes set via label text click)
screen_transitions.S10_launch_button: ALL DONE! + LAUNCH BUTLER AI present, primary launch button tapped

action_items: No fixes required. The bug is RESOLVED in the current code. The previous chain of fixes (deleted duplicate `(tabs)/index.tsx`, deleted orphan `(tabs)/onboarding.tsx`, set `initialRouteName="nexushome"` in tabs layout, wrapped nexushome in inline _NexusBoundary, and the inline `Index → setDecision('go_home') → <Redirect href='/(tabs)/nexushome' />` + imperative `router.replace` belt-and-suspenders) all work as designed on the Expo web preview.

Real-device APK note for E1: Web verification confirms the JS-level flow is correct. If the navy screen still appears on EAS APK, that would now have to be a native-only issue (e.g. RN bundle missing a require, native module crash on TabLayout mount, or React Native screens initialization). Recommend adding a top-level RN ErrorBoundary in `app/_layout.tsx` that surfaces any caught render error to logcat for the next APK test — currently only `_NexusBoundary` inside nexushome catches errors. A higher boundary would also catch failures in `(tabs)/_layout.tsx` itself.

Minor: consider adding a `testID="onboarding-screen10-launch"` alias on the primary LAUNCH button (currently `onboarding-launch-primary`) to match what `test_credentials.md` documents (line 29). Either update the doc or add the testID — they're inconsistent.
critical_code_review_comments: app/index.tsx handleComplete is well-designed: both `setDecision('go_home') → <Redirect>` AND `router.replace(...)` fallbacks fire — confirmed working.
OnboardingOverlay Screen10Ready.enterApp uses a `firedRef` dedupe guard with try/catch around onComplete + Alert recovery — robust.
(tabs)/_layout.tsx stamps `@butler_boot_complete_at` on mount (line 47-52); this diagnostic value was observed in localStorage after launch, proving the tabs layout mounts successfully on web.
Tabs.initialRouteName='nexushome' is set, freezeOnBlur+lazy+animation:'none' optimizations active.

No deprecated packages observed in the files reviewed; expo-camera is used correctly (not expo-barcode-scanner). expo-file-system/legacy is imported in nexushome.tsx — this is the explicit legacy shim, intentional, not the deprecated `expo-file-system` default export.

Mild: nexushome.tsx is 1900+ lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting MechBay sub-components, NexusQRModal, and the card components into separate files for maintainability. Not blocking, not a bug.
seed_data_creation: Cleared localStorage to force first-launch onboarding, then walked all 10 screens by interacting with the actual UI (no storage seeding shortcuts used — full real flow test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: The LAUNCH → nexushome path works on Expo web preview. If the user reports a navy screen on EAS APK again, the issue is native-only and not reproducible on web. Browser automation cannot test the real APK; suggest E1 add a top-level RN ErrorBoundary in app/_layout.tsx to capture native render errors for the next device test.
rca_of_issue: Bug REPRODUCTION: clear localStorage → reload → walk all 10 onboarding screens → tap LAUNCH BUTLER AI. PRIOR ROOT CAUSE (already fixed by previous agents): duplicate `(tabs)/index.tsx` route file shadowed the home route; orphan `(tabs)/onboarding.tsx` confused tabs layout; default initial route resolved to the wrong screen on first mount in production builds. CURRENT STATE: Index gate renders OnboardingOverlay inline → on LAUNCH tap, Screen10Ready.enterApp fires AsyncStorage.multiSet (fire-and-forget) + parent's handleComplete → setDecision('go_home') + router.replace('/(tabs)/nexushome'). On next render the gate emits <Redirect href='/(tabs)/nexushome' />, the (tabs) group mounts with initialRouteName='nexushome', and the home tab renders. Verified by pathname trail `/` → `/nexushome`, by `@butler_onboarding_done_v2='true'` in storage, by `@butler_boot_complete_at` being stamped (proving _layout.tsx useEffect ran), by all 8 tab labels appearing in the DOM, and by ZERO console errors during the transition.
